zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Grey 1st Baron於1256年出生在英國德比夏爾可德諾時，他的父親John de Grey27歲，母親Lucy Mohun24歲。他於大約1281年與Eleanor de Courtenay在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年9月1日在英國肯特艾勒斯福德享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特艾勒斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Grey 1st Baron于1256年出生在英国德比夏爾可德諾时，他的父亲John de Grey27岁，母亲Lucy Mohun24岁。他于大约1281年与Eleanor de Courtenay在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年9月1日在英国肯特艾勒斯福德享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特艾勒斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Grey 1st Baron was born in 1256, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, his father, John de Grey, was 27 and his mother, Lucy Mohun, was 24. He married Eleanor de Courtenay about 1281, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 September 1308, in Aylesford, Kent, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Aylesford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Grey 1st Baron est né en 1256, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Grey, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lucy Mohun, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Courtenay environ 1281, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1308, à Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Grey 1st Baron 1256 in Codnor, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Grey 27 und seine Mutter Lucy Mohun 24. Er hat um 1281 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Eleanor de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1308 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Aylesford, Kent, England und wurde in Aylesford, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Grey 1st Baron è nato il nel 1256 nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, John de Grey, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Mohun, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Courtenay circa 1281, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1308, nel Aylesford, Kent, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Aylesford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey 1st Baronが1256年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父John de Greyは27歳，母Lucy Mohunは24歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスデボンでEleanor de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年9月1日にイギリスケントエイレスフォードで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントエイレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey 1st Baron(이)가 1256년 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Grey(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Mohun(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Eleanor de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 9월 1일 영국 켄트 아일레스퍼드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 아일레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Grey 1st Baron nasceu em 1256, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Grey, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Mohun, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Courtenay aproximadamente 1281, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1308, em Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Grey 1st Baron родился в 1256 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Grey было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Mohun, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Courtenay около 1281 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1308 г. в местности аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Grey 1st Baron nació en 1256, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Grey, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lucy Mohun, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Courtenay aproximadamente 1281, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1308, en Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
